prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: forensic evidence photograph. Story world: Red Creek Winter. Setting: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown. Recurring motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass. Render forensic evidence still for "Ski lodge camera still" with chain-of-custody cues, believable wear, and subtle hidden clue placement.. Subgenre: small-town winter mystery mystery. Tone: INTENSE. Immediate scene brief: Red Creek Winter - Evidence Still - Ski lodge camera still. Render a non-graphic investigative still focused on objects, architecture, weather traces, timestamps, clothing fibers, tire tracks, paper records, and scene aftermath. No bodies, no visible injuries, no attack in progress, no blood spatter, no gore, no active weapon use, no dismemberment. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Render as forensic or investigative photography of a real object or environment, with tangible wear, shallow depth of field, and subtle clue placement. Keep any text non-prominent and diegetic only.
source_prompt: Story: Red Creek Winter (red-creek-winter) | Hook: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi. | Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown | Villain: The White Knife | Villain worldview: Fear is the only honest truth in a town built on denial. | Motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass. Render forensic evidence still for "Ski lodge camera still" with chain-of-custody cues, believable wear, and subtle hidden clue placement.
